Class VariableStringGenerator.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.bloviate.gen.AbstractBuilder<String>
io.bloviate.gen.VariableStringGenerator.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<String>
Enclosing class:
VariableStringGenerator
public static class VariableStringGenerator.Builder extends AbstractBuilder<String>
Builder for VariableStringGenerator instances.

  • Field Summary

    DEFAULT_REFERENCE, random

    Method
    Description

    build()
    Builds and returns a configured data generator.
    VariableStringGenerator.Builder
    letters(boolean letters)
    Controls whether ASCII letters (A-Za-z) are included in the character set.
    VariableStringGenerator.Builder
    maxLength(int maxLength)
    Sets the inclusive upper bound of the random length range.
    VariableStringGenerator.Builder

    Sets the inclusive lower bound of the random length range.
    VariableStringGenerator.Builder
    numbers(boolean numbers)
    Controls whether decimal digits (0-9) are included in the character set.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(RandomGenerator random)
      Constructs a new builder.
      Parameters:
      random - the seeded random generator backing the produced generator

  • Method Details

    • minLength

      public VariableStringGenerator.Builder minLength(int minLength)
      Sets the inclusive lower bound of the random length range.
      Parameters:
      minLength - the minimum string length; effectively clamped up to 1 at generation time (lengths below 1 are treated as 1). Defaults to 1.
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • maxLength

      public VariableStringGenerator.Builder maxLength(int maxLength)
      Sets the inclusive upper bound of the random length range.
      Parameters:
      maxLength - the maximum string length, inclusive. Defaults to 10.
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • letters

      public VariableStringGenerator.Builder letters(boolean letters)
      Controls whether ASCII letters (A-Za-z) are included in the character set.
      Parameters:
      letters - true to include letters. Defaults to true.
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • numbers

      public VariableStringGenerator.Builder numbers(boolean numbers)
      Controls whether decimal digits (0-9) are included in the character set.
      Parameters:
      numbers - true to include digits. Defaults to false.
      Returns:
      this builder, for chaining

    • build

      public VariableStringGenerator build()
      Description copied from interface: Builder
      Builds and returns a configured data generator.
      Returns:
      a new DataGenerator configured with the builder's settings
